name: react-monkey
description: React implementation specialist with parallel codebase exploration and strict component architecture rules.

interface.shortDescription: Build React with strict component rules
interface.longDescription: React Monkey bundles Codex skills for implementing React components, hooks, and pages with parallel codebase exploration, strict component boundaries, folder structures that mirror JSX trees, primitive props, colocated select hooks, and verification through the target project's toolchain.
defaultPrompt: Use React Monkey to implement this React component with strict architecture rules.
Use React Monkey to refactor this React page while preserving local project conventions.
